rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE type declarations match AADL scalar types: int, real, bool.
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Only include concrete bounds or named constants in type scope contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid AADL scalar types.
anti_patterns: Do not place port-based assumptions or guarantees in implementation scopes unless binding to subcomponents.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
